name: Love for fun || Dr. Wondertainment!
description:
"Tick Tock on the clock! Time is wasting while we could be make wonders!"

Opening PC..... Opening File Repository "Road to Nowhere" ..... Pick a file

>Dr. Wondertainment

Isabel Helga Anastasia Parvati Wondertainment or Dr. Wondertainment

Well hello there dear diary reader that is probably me!

Today I had the most wonderfully strange day I have had in a while! It all started with the stupid board denying my "Mister Screamer" toy. Something about psychological damage or something. I would love to laugh but that was my only idea. . . Second off I had the most wonderfully lunch! A full English breakfast. You might think "Isabel Helga Anastasia Parvati Wondertainment. How strange are you that you ate breakfast for lunch" and to that I say I have had neither lunch or breakfast earlier today is this is a brunch! :3

But now onto the juiciest stuff

Someone appeared! Like no boom 💥, vroom 🏎, kablooey 👊 or dudoom! Just was there one moment whenI was sure there was no one before
